mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RISK_ASSESSMENTS ( ASSESSMENT_ID, USER_ID, HEALTH_RECORD_ID, DIFY_WORKFLOW_ID, RISK_LEVEL, RISK_SCORE, BMI_SNAPSHOT, GLUCOSE_LEVEL, CONFIDENCE, GENERATION_STATUS, REPORT_SUMMARY, AI_RAW_RESPONSE, DEL_FLAG, ASSESSED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{assessmentId}, #{userId}, #{healthRecordId}, #{difyWorkflowId}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskScore}, #{bmiSnapshot}, #{glucoseLevel}, #{confidence}, #{generationStatus}, #{reportSummary}, #{aiRawResponse}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ASSESSMENT_ID AS assessmentId, USER_ID AS userId, HEALTH_RECORD_ID AS healthRecordId, DIFY_WORKFLOW_ID AS difyWorkflowId, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, RISK_SCORE AS riskScore, BMI_SNAPSHOT AS bmiSnapshot, GLUCOSE_LEVEL AS glucoseLevel, CONFIDENCE AS confidence, GENERATION_STATUS AS generationStatus, REPORT_SUMMARY AS reportSummary, AI_RAW_RESPONSE AS aiRawResponse, ASSESSED_AT AS assessedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE ASSESSMENT_ID = #{assessmentId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ASSESSMENT_ID AS assessmentId, USER_ID AS userId, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, RISK_SCORE AS riskScore, ASSESSED_AT AS assessedAt FROM RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY ASSESSED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ASSESSMENT_ID AS assessmentId, USER_ID AS userId, HEALTH_RECORD_ID AS healthRecordId, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, RISK_SCORE AS riskScore, BMI_SNAPSHOT AS bmiSnapshot, GLUCOSE_LEVEL AS glucoseLevel, CONFIDENCE AS confidence, REPORT_SUMMARY AS reportSummary, ASSESSED_AT AS assessedAt FROM RISK_ASSESSMENTS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY ASSESSED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FACTOR_ID AS factorId, ASSESSMENT_ID AS assessmentId, FACTOR_NAME AS factorName, WEIGHT AS weight, DESCRIPTION AS description, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM RISK_ASSESSMENT_FACTORS WHERE ASSESSMENT_ID = #{assessmentId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT SUGGESTION_ID AS suggestionId, ASSESSMENT_ID AS assessmentId, CATEGORY AS category, PRIORITY AS priority, CONTENT AS content, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM RISK_ASSESSMENT_SUGGESTIONS WHERE ASSESSMENT_ID = #{assessmentId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY PRIORITY, SORT_ORDER
